items.content: Oman & Iran discuss Strait of Hormuz transit amid ceasefire doubts.
WSJ: US and Iran positions remain too far apart for a ceasefire before Trump's deadline.
Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA, conveying response to US via Pakistan. Emphasizes necessity of permanent end to the war.
ALERT: Adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal. BREAKING NEWS.
Axios: Trump may delay attacks on Iranian infrastructure if he sees real signs of a deal.
Iran rejects Trump's peace deal. Adviser warns Trump has '20 hours' to surrender — or allies face 'back to the Stone Age'.
Trump to reportedly 'delay' attacks on Iran if he sees signs of a deal (KALSHI)
US doubts Iran deadline extension as tough response seen as negotiating tactic (Axios). US signals fading patience but keeps door open to last-minute deal.
Axios: Trump may hold off on tomorrow's strikes against civilian infrastructure in Iran and extend deadline if he sees deal coming together, defense official says.
Trump may delay potential strikes on Iran if meaningful progress toward deal is seen. Iran responded with 10-point proposal.
BREAKING: US oil prices extend gains to $115.50/barrel, now up +110% since the December 2025 low. Inflation expectations are rising.
Fear among retail investors rising: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0, highest in at least 20 years.
Gold now trades more than most major assets: avg $361B/day in 2025, nearly 3x 2021.

BREAKING: Iran delivered its '10-point' response to US '15-point peace plan.' Points: 1. Guarantee Iran won't be attacked again 2. Permanent end to war, not ceasefire 3. End Israeli strikes in Lebanon
BREAKING: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'
Trump: 'OPEN THE F****N STRAIT' — threatens Iran with 'living in hell' if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'
Trump: 'I want to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.'
Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.
Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms. Trump insists on Hormuz free passage.
Trump: 'Every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.'
Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop.
Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal — wants permanent end to the war.
Iran views the war and Strait of Hormuz as crucial bargaining chip to extract concessions from Washington.

market_data.Fear_indicator: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0 — highest in 20 years
market_data.Sentiment: Ceasefire doubts causing extreme volatility; Asia mixed/higher on hopes of deal

negotiation_status.US_15pt_plan: Offered by US; Iran delivered 10-point counter
negotiation_status.Iran_10pt: 1. Guarantee no further attacks 2. Permanent war end (not ceasefire) 3. End Israeli strikes in Lebanon
negotiation_status.Trump_rejects: Iran's terms; demands Hormuz free passage
negotiation_status.Current: Ghalibaf (Parliament Speaker adviser) REJECTS deal — fresh from 11:05 CST
negotiation_status.Trump_caveat: May delay strikes if real signs of deal seen (Axios, 11:00-11:05 CST)
negotiation_status.Russia: Offering mediation, demanding US drop ultimatums
negotiation_status.Oman: Mediating on Strait of Hormuz transit

key_deadlines.Tue_declare: 'Power plant and bridge day' — threatened infrastructure strikes
key_deadlines.Wed_1PM_ET: Trump military press conference (3 hrs after deadline)
key_deadlines.Current_CST: 11:37 CST Tue Apr 7 — ~12.5 hours to deadline
